name: DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Creator Combo
description: The Osmo Pocket 3 Creator Combo from DJI is a comprehensive mobile and studio production kit that includes everything you need to capture stable and smooth motion video and sound.

features.Key Features: DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Camera | Battery Handle | Handle with 1/4"-20 Thread | Wide-Angle Lens | DJI Mic 2 Transmitter & Windscreen | DJI Mic 2 Clip Magnet | Mini Tripod, Wrist Strap | Carrying Bag, Protective Cover
features.What’s In The Box: Osmo Pocket 3 x1 | Type-C to Type-C PD Cable x1 | Osmo Pocket 3 Protective Cover x1 | DJI Wrist Strap x1 | Osmo Pocket 3 Handle With 1/4″ Thread x1 | Osmo Pocket 3 Wide-Angle Lens x1 | DJI Mic 2 Transmitter (Shadow Black) x1 | DJI Mic 2 Windscreen x1 | DJI Mic 2 Clip Magnet x1 | Osmo Pocket 3 Battery Handle x1 | Osmo Mini Tripod x1 | Osmo Pocket 3 Carrying Bag x1 | Quick Start Guide x1 | Disclaimer x1 | Warranty Card x1
